name: Technical Indicator Calculator
description: Daily (5 PM ET, Mon-Fri): Calculates RSI(14), MACD(12/26/9), SMA 50/200, Bollinger Bands, volume analysis for all watchlist tickers.

parameters.content:
## Technical Indicators

Required: postgresApi
RSI(14), MACD(12/26/9), SMA 50/200, BB(20,2), Vol SMA(20)

parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT w.ticker FROM watchlists w WHERE w.status='active'
SELECT price_date,close_price,high_price,low_price,volume FROM daily_prices WHERE ticker=? ORDER BY price_date DESC LIMIT 250

INSERT INTO technical_indicators (ticker,indicator_date,indicator_name,value,signal) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?) ON CONFLICT (ticker,indicator_date,indicator_name) DO UPDATE SET value=EXCLUDED.value,signal=EXCLUDED.signal;
